pr.title: Record: Packed N-gram + Two-Pass   Dirichlet CTW — val_bpb 0.0830 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Packed order-2..13 n-gram artifact plus sliding-window cache warms a two-pass rescore that mixes orders via hierarchical Dirichlet CTW and phrase cache lookups.
techniques: Packed order-2..13 n-gram artifact from full training shards
Two-pass sliding-window eval: pass1 builds cache, pass2 rescoring all positions
Hierarchical Dirichlet CTW mixing where each order's posterior seeds the next prior
